title: Oil prices move lower as U.S. weighs releasing sanctioned Iranian crude to boost supply
summary_full: Oil prices were lower on Friday after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Washington may soon lift sanctions on Iranian crude stored aboard tankers.
summary_public: Oil prices were lower on Friday after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Washington may soon lift sanctions on Iranian crude stored aboard tankers.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. weighs releasing sanctioned Iranian crude to boost supply
